summary:
Agent concluded based on an inferred analysis lacking specific mentions for other options; thus concluding indirectly through process elimination suggesting \textbf{lack of direct connectivity}. This summary highlights critical aspects while adhering strictly within provided constraints regarding focus areas like anatomy specifics pertinent here but omits unnecessary elaborations maintaining brevity crucially needed per instructions. Key point was identifying non-connectedness via exclusion method emphasizing relevance over exhaustive detail listing all possibilities exhaustively which wasn't required as primary task focused more narrowly towards core requirement identification succinctly achieved above.
